casting_vision.casting_philosophy: Non-actors preferred for authenticity — faces that carry life, not performances
casting_vision.era_style_for_characters: Working-class Southwest — sun damage, practical clothing, no vanity
visual_contrasts: Ray's weathered age vs. daughter's youth
casting_vision.character_emotional_state: Quiet regret masked by stoic routine
casting_vision.character_visual_note: Hands should tell the story — cracked, calloused, never still
